data.body:
GAP AMENDMENTS from opus gap analysis:

1. Run format check inside main() AFTER empty-file-path guard (not at script init) — ruff/prettier with zero args exits non-zero with usage text to stderr.

2. Pass FILE_PATH directly (already absolute) to format check command — do NOT prepend REPO_ROOT (gate-2b receives absolute paths per its docstring).

3. Run format check in subshell with cd REPO_ROOT: (cd "$REPO_ROOT" && $CMD_FORMAT_CHECK "$FILE_PATH" >/dev/null 2>&1) — format commands expect repo-relative cwd.

4. Handle exit 127 (command not found) as soft-skip: emit [DSO WARN] 'format check command not found' and leave _FORMAT_CHECK_EVIDENCE empty (distinct from 'format check failed' path).

5. Escape evidence content before concatenation — strip newlines, prevent JSON-breaking characters. Use the existing evidence-string approach (single-line description only, not raw format output).

6. Early-exit path (line 260 — no file provided): skip format check entirely, _FORMAT_CHECK_EVIDENCE stays empty. Correct and expected.

7. RED tests must also cover: commands.format_check set to empty string → same WARN+skip behavior as absent; command-not-found → soft-skip WARN.
